suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that migration tests use os.tmpdir() with unique subdirectories per test as the standard pattern for migration testing. Also document the updateEnvFile safety behavior (preserves existing values without --overwrite).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both persona-memory-migration and channel-provider-migration features use this pattern consistently.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that the migration script's provider mapping does not include 'zai' as a PI_API value. The project uses Z.AI (PI_API=zai) per AGENTS.md, but the migration script only maps openai, anthropic, and openrouter providers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: channel-provider-migration review found that ZAI_API_KEY is not handled in the API key naming chain in migrateModel().
